raw_log_normalization: pulled via `rtk proxy gh run view --job <id> --log` and stripped the leading <job>\t<step>\t prefix per line.
notes: Renovate/babel branch (dependabot-style babel update) caused 13 jest snapshots to fail across 3 test suites because babel changed how `import()` parser errors are reported. The snapshot diff shows the old vs new error text: `- Unexpected token (1:8)` vs `+ \`import()\` requires exactly one or two arguments. (1:1)`. multi_failure = true. Test totals: 3 failed test suites of 1503, 13 failed snapshots of 12099. signal_position is interesting: first FAIL block at L399 of 2280 ≈ 17% (EARLY zone — first one in v2 corpus), summary at L2242 ≈ 98% (late). Selected as Batch 2 case 4. Fills v1.3 snapshot_or_golden_diff gap (was 0/16). First v2 case in `early` signal_position.
